case_title: LEE HEIDHUES ET AL VS. BOOKING.COM (USA) INC.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA) INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LEE HEIDHUES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HEIDHUES. DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEIDHUES, LEE HEIDHUES, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA) INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HEIDHUES, LEE HEIDHUES, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA) INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$33.50) SERVED NOV-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA) INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEIDHUES, LEE HEIDHUES, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOKING.COM (USA) INC. $114.70 PRINCIPAL, $108.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $223.20, BOOKING.COM'S TERMS OF SERVICE DISCLAIM ANY GUARANTEES ABOUT THE QUALITY OF THE ROOMS, AND PLAINTIFFS' EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATES THEY PAID THE HOTEL DIRECTLY AND NOT DEFENDANT. THE COURT NONETHELESS AWARDS PLAINTIFFS THE VALUE OF BOOKING.COM'S OFFER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
